name: Broccoli & Blue Cheese Puff Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk eggs until light in color. Mix in white pepper and nutmeg.
2. Cook chopped broccoli separately.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F for 10 minutes.
4. Roll out pastry large enough to fit into a 9 inch deep dish quiche pan.
5. Pour filling into crust.
6. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
